div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Counselor of Legation in Switzerland (Mayer), at Geneva
div.p: 131. Your 223, January 12, 2 p.m.Not printed. If you receive notification of meeting of Committee for technical cooperation between the League and China, with invitation to attend, Department desires that you give an informal acceptance and attend in an absolutely informal and strictly unofficial capacity. Department is instructing Paris to send you text or substance of instructions issued to MarrinerJ. Theodore Marriner, Counselor of Embassy in France. in connection with his attendance in July, 1933, at meeting of this Committee.See telegram No. 145, July 16, 1933, midnight, from the Acting Secretary of State to the Secretary of State in London, Foreign Relations, 1933, vol. iii, p. 499.
